'''√w-h-dh''' ('''wahadha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pelletize|pelletize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-h-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pelletize|pelletize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √w-h-dh
|-
! Lemma
| wahadha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wahadhithi|wahadhithi]] || [[word:wahadhiji|wahadhiji]] || [[word:wahadhishi|wahadhishi]] || [[word:wahadhi|wahadhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wahadhuthuth|wahadhuthuth]] || [[word:wahadhujuj|wahadhujuj]] || [[word:wahadhushush|wahadhushush]] || [[word:wahadh|wahadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wahadhuthu|wahadhuthu]] || [[word:wahadhuju|wahadhuju]] || [[word:wahadhushu|wahadhushu]] || [[word:wahadhu|wahadhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wahadhufuth|wahadhufuth]] || [[word:wahadhufuj|wahadhufuj]] || [[word:wahadhufush|wahadhufush]] || [[word:wahadhuf|wahadhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wahadhethe|wahadhethe]] || [[word:wahadheje|wahadheje]] || [[word:wahadheshe|wahadheshe]] || [[word:wahadhe|wahadhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wahadhothoth|wahadhothoth]] || [[word:wahadhojoj|wahadhojoj]] || [[word:wahadhoshosh|wahadhoshosh]] || [[word:wahadh|wahadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wahadhotho|wahadhotho]] || [[word:wahadhojo|wahadhojo]] || [[word:wahadhosho|wahadhosho]] || [[word:wahadho|wahadho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wahadhofoth|wahadhofoth]] || [[word:wahadhofoj|wahadhofoj]] || [[word:wahadhofosh|wahadhofosh]] || [[word:wahadhof|wahadhof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wahadhïf|wahadhïf]] || [[word:wahadhïf|wahadhïf]] || [[word:wahadhïf|wahadhïf]] || [[word:wahadhïf|wahadhïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wahadhïfïf|wahadhïfïf]] || [[word:wahadhïfïf|wahadhïfïf]] || [[word:wahadhïfïf|wahadhïfïf]] || [[word:wahadhïfïf|wahadhïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wahadhïf|wahadhïf]] || [[word:wahadhïf|wahadhïf]] || [[word:wahadhïf|wahadhïf]] || [[word:wahadhïf|wahadhïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wahadhïf|wahadhïf]] || [[word:wahadhïf|wahadhïf]] || [[word:wahadhïf|wahadhïf]] || [[word:wahadhïf|wahadhïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wahadhæthæ|wahadhæthæ]] || [[word:wahadhæjæ|wahadhæjæ]] || [[word:wahadhæshæ|wahadhæshæ]] || [[word:wahadhæ|wahadhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wahadhathath|wahadhathath]] || [[word:wahadhajaj|wahadhajaj]] || [[word:wahadhashash|wahadhashash]] || [[word:wahadh|wahadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wahadhatha|wahadhatha]] || [[word:wahadhaja|wahadhaja]] || [[word:wahadhasha|wahadhasha]] || [[word:wahadha|wahadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wahadhafath|wahadhafath]] || [[word:wahadhafaj|wahadhafaj]] || [[word:wahadhafash|wahadhafash]] || [[word:wahadhaf|wahadhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:wahadhasha|wahadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gowahadhasha|gowahadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiwahadhasha|gokiwahadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:wahadhnüsha|wahadhnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gowahadhnknüsha|gowahadhnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiwahadhnüsha|gokiwahadhnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wahadhshësha|wahadhshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowahadhnkshësha|gowahadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwahadhshësha|gokiwahadhshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wahadhrosha|wahadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowahadhnkrosha|gowahadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwahadhrosha|gokiwahadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wahadhmusha|wahadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowahadhnkmusha|gowahadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwahadhmusha|gokiwahadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:wahadhsherasha|wahadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gowahadhnksherasha|gowahadhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiwahadhsherasha|gokiwahadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:wahadhngasha|wahadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gowahadhnkngasha|gowahadhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiwahadhngasha|gokiwahadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wahadhyasha|wahadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowahadhnkyasha|gowahadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiwahadhyasha|gokiwahadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:wahadhyamasha|wahadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gowahadhnkyamasha|gowahadhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiwahadhyamasha|gokiwahadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:wahadhnüshësha|wahadhnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowahadhnknüshësha|gowahadhnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwahadhnüshësha|gokiwahadhnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wahadhnürosha|wahadhnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowahadhnknürosha|gowahadhnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwahadhnürosha|gokiwahadhnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wahadhnümusha|wahadhnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowahadhnknümusha|gowahadhnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwahadhnümusha|gokiwahadhnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:wahadhshënüsha|wahadhshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowahadhnkshënüsha|gowahadhnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwahadhshënüsha|gokiwahadhshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wahadhshërosha|wahadhshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowahadhnkshërosha|gowahadhnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwahadhshërosha|gokiwahadhshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wahadhshëmusha|wahadhshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowahadhnkshëmusha|gowahadhnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwahadhshëmusha|gokiwahadhshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:wahadhronüsha|wahadhronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowahadhnkronüsha|gowahadhnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwahadhronüsha|gokiwahadhronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:wahadhroshësha|wahadhroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowahadhnkroshësha|gowahadhnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwahadhroshësha|gokiwahadhroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wahadhromusha|wahadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowahadhnkromusha|gowahadhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwahadhromusha|gokiwahadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:wahadhmunüsha|wahadhmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowahadhnkmunüsha|gowahadhnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwahadhmunüsha|gokiwahadhmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:wahadhmushësha|wahadhmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowahadhnkmushësha|gowahadhnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwahadhmushësha|gokiwahadhmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wahadhmurosha|wahadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowahadhnkmurosha|gowahadhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwahadhmurosha|gokiwahadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:wahadh|wahadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:wæhædh|wæhædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:howahadh|howahadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:howæhædh|howæhædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowahadh|hohowahadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowæhædh|hohowæhædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nüwahadh|nüwahadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nüwæhædh|nüwæhædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüwahadh|nünüwahadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüwæhædh|nünüwæhædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïwahadh|nïwahadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïwæhædh|nïwæhædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïwahadh|nïnïwahadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïwæhædh|nïnïwæhædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luwahadh|luwahadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luwæhædh|luwæhædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwahadh|luluwahadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwæhædh|luluwæhædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liwahadh|liwahadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liwæhædh|liwæhædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwahadh|liliwahadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwæhædh|liliwæhædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kowahadh|kowahadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kowæhædh|kowæhædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowahadh|kokowahadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowæhædh|kokowæhædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kewahadh|kewahadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kewæhædh|kewæhædh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewahadh|kekewahadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewæhædh|kekewæhædh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
